sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82358" key="periteramni/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιτεραμνίζω</orth>, <sense id="n82358.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cover all over</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χρυσῷ τὰ χείλη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0586.tlg001:63" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">63</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
